title: 2026 Census soundtrack
content:
## 2026 Census soundtrack
Turn up the volume while you complete your 2026 Census!
Discover the music that defines our country while helping provide the data that shapes our future.
From legendary Canadian artists to emerging local talent, these curated playlists celebrate the diversity and creativity that makes Canada’s music scene truly unique. Enjoy Canadian classics or discover new favourites as you complete your census.
From coast to coast to coast, the 2026 Census soundtrack celebrates Canadian artists. Get comfortable, press play, and let’s experience Canada’s musical talent together.
For more information on the 2026 Census, please visit census.gc.ca .

### Loons and Mellow Tunes
Lean back and relax to the calming sounds of loon calls and Canadian songbirds.
C’est le vibe ! Iconic hits and fresh beats that showcase the heart and soul of French Canada.

### Ketchup Chips and Road Trips
Fuel your mind and soul with a Canadian soundtrack, and of course some ketchup chips.

### Pumped Up (Moose) Tracks
Your daily dose of energy, no coffee required.

### Celebrating Indigenous Artists
From traditional to contemporary, a celebration of Indigenous artists.

### Storytellers of the Land
Every note tells a story, from joyful jigs to heartfelt ballads.
